close_reason: split_path returns (&str, &str) slices instead of allocating Strings
description:
src/lib.rs:140-148 split_path returns Option<(String, String)>. Both halves are immediately consumed by from_uri: vault is borrowed for format!("https://{vault_name}.vault.azure.net") (no need for owned String) and secret_name is moved into the struct (so one String allocation is necessary).

Cost: one extra heap allocation per from_uri call.

Fix: change split_path to return Option<(&str, &str)> and let from_uri convert only the secret_name into String. Trivial rewrite.
title: split_path allocates two Strings; could return &str slices
